title: aster biformis
intro: Aster biformis, also known as the Two-formed Aster, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe and calm the skin. The health benefits of Aster biformis include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Aster biformis is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
